# Read the provided file
path = '/mnt/data/file-FrAxN4v3ZJ9uZCpSG2YE9D-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

text = open('/mnt/data/file-FrAxN4v3ZJ9uZCpSG2YE9D-text_to_analyse.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
print(text)

# define helper to find substrings and output indices around them
def find_all(sub):
    starts = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = text.find(sub, start)
        if i == -1:
            break
        starts.append(i)
        start = i + 1
    return starts

subs = [
"إِنَّمَا الْحَيَاةُ الْدُّنْيَا شَتَّى وَالْآخِرَةُ حَسْنَةٌ لَّوْ كَانُوا يَعْلَمُونَ",
"إِنَّمَا أَمْرُنَا إِذَا أَذَنَ لَهُ الْأَمْرُ فَإِنَّ الْأَمْرَ لَيْسَ بِيَدِ الْإِنْسِ",
"إِنَّمَا الْمُبْتَلَىٰ أَصْحَابُ الْجَنَّةِ",
"إِنَّمَا الْعَبْدُ مُحْتَبَسٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ فَيَمْشِي فِي الْأَرْضِ، فَإِذَا أَصَابَهُ الْمَفْتُون"
]

for sub in subs:
    locs = find_all(sub)
    print(sub, locs, [ (i, i+len(sub)) for i in locs ])

def context(i, j, pad=10):
    print(repr(text[i-pad:j+pad]))

# Check around each
spans = [(328, 414),(698,786),(947,990),(1357,1456)]
for (i,j) in spans:
    print(i,j)
    context(i,j, pad=20)

spans_info = [
    (328, 414, "Aya"),
    (698, 786, "Aya"),
    (947, 990, "Aya"),
    (1357, 1456, "Hadeeth"),
]
citations = []
for s,e,typ in spans_info:
    span_text = text[s:e]
    citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": span_text, "citation_type": "Aya" if typ=="Aya" else "Hadeeth"})
citations
